summary: Iteration 2 (role-picker auth, pagination, driver profile, dashboard trends, vehicle photos, Fastag sync) tested end-to-end. Rewrote backend pytest suite to remove obsolete Bearer/Google auth and exercise X-Role RBAC. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend critical flows verified: role picker shows 4 cards, switch-role works, dashboard trend charts render, driver profile page loads with stat cards + 3 tabs, vehicle Photos tab present, Fastag sync UI present, RBAC gating correct for driver/admin roles.

issues: Some recharge rows display '—' for Vehicle column even though vehicle_id is set (likely enrichment skipping non-toll rows or older seed data); cosmetic — does not affect functionality.

action_items: Optionally verify Fastag list enrichment of recharge-type rows (vehicle_number column shows '—' for some rows).

Note: expenses-pagination-info / expenses-next-page test-ids only render when total > page_size (25). Current dataset has <25 expense rows so footer is hidden — this is correct behavior; if main agent wants visible pagination footer always, change CrudModule to render footer with page=1 of 1.
critical_code_review_comments: helpers.py make_crud is well-factored — single source for pagination + RBAC gating across modules.

auth.py defaults missing X-Role to 'admin' — this is intentional per spec but means a misconfigured frontend silently gets admin rights. Consider logging or returning 401 when header missing in production hardening.
routes_ops.py PATCH /api/repairs/{id}/status enforces approval RBAC inline (management/admin only) — correctly returns 403 for data_entry.
routes_assets.py fastag_sync correctly returns 400 when vehicle has no fastag_number and 404 when vehicle missing; clearly marks response as simulated:true.
routes_analytics.py dashboard_trends returns exactly 6 month entries with month/expense/km/fuel_cost — matches frontend recharts contract.
make_crud delete is admin-only; data_entry returns 403 — verified.
test_credentials: No auth — X-Role header (driver|data_entry|management|admin). Frontend: localStorage.setItem('fleet_role', '<role>') or click role card at /login.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed records (documents, repairs, trips, vehicle) and clean them up via admin DELETE. No persistent test data leaks. Seeded vehicle 0e572cbb-d447-4107-a08b-e7c7f409c73b (MH 12 AB 1234) is preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_fleet_backend.py is the canonical regression suite for iteration 2 (X-Role header model). Covers: roles, pagination shape (paged + all=true), RBAC (driver/data_entry/admin POST/PUT/DELETE), repair approval PATCH, dashboard + trends, driver stats, fastag sync (incl. 400/404 paths), reports + Excel/PDF export, expense ledger, vehicle summary. Seeded vehicle id 0e572cbb-d447-4107-a08b-e7c7f409c73b has fastag FT123. Frontend: role picker at /login, switch via [data-testid=switch-role-btn] in header. Pagination footer in CrudModule only renders when total>page_size; bulk-seed if you need to UI-test the footer.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
